heading: Entitlement of officers discharged or retired under this chapter to separation pay or retired pay
label: 642 Entitlement of officers discharged or retired under this chapter to separation pay or retired pay
notes: Effective DateSection effective , but the authority to prescribe regulations under this section effective on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1980 Amendment note under .Sept. 15, 1981Dec. 12, 1980section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , but the authority to prescribe regulations under this section effective on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1980 Amendment note under .Sept. 15, 1981Dec. 12, 1980section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: An officer who is discharged under this chapter is entitled, if eligible therefor, to separation pay under .section 1174 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: An officer who is retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 71 of this title.
